image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science reveals secrets about blocked practice limits that social media gets wrong.
Context visual: Blocked practice means repeating the same skill without variation. But, is that the best way to learn?
Escalation visual: Studies show that while blocked practice can build confidence, it doesn’t prepare you for real challenges.
Evidence visual: In contrast, varied practice—mixing skills—enhances retention and adaptability in real scenarios.
Payoff visual: So, while social media glorifies repetition, true mastery lies in embracing variety.
Cta visual: Want to master your skills? Start mixing it up! Like and follow for more insights.
